source_recall.pass: find >= 1 org with PLS-specific specimens OR find >= 1 org that explicitly lists PLS (not just ALS/MND) in their catalog
source_recall.notes: PLS is ultra-rare. C-BIG is the only AminoChain source. Pipeline may find academic MND clinics or ALS centers that also collect PLS — these are valid additional finds. Critical failure mode: pipeline finds ALS sources and labels them as PLS-eligible without explicit PLS documentation.

checks: every [documented] claim has verbatim quote + source ID
specimen counts cite a source, never estimated from training data
PLS diagnosis must be explicitly cited — not inferred from ALS/MND collection

pillar_coverage_per_source.pass: mean >= 40% of available fields filled per source

checks: every claim carries one of the 4 labels
every [verified]/[unverified] cites the [documented] facts it's based on
hypotheses state what verification was attempted

The Neuro C-BIG Repository.notes: C-BIG has the only known PLS-specific specimens in AminoChain, named contact, documented open biobank infrastructure, and longitudinal collection capability. PLS/ALS co-labeling is a known complication — confirmed PLS-only count is 20 donors, which is the realistic usable N.

score_calibration.pass: mean absolute error <= 1.0 per criterion vs expected range

must_flag_as_unknown.reason: PLS specimens co-labeled with ALS in registry — pure PLS confirmation requires neuropathology or clinical review per donor
critical for PLS diagnosis validity — not indexed in specimen registry
not indexed — required to contextualize biomarker levels
functional rating not in specimen registry — requires clinical data linkage
thaw viability records not indexed — critical for PBMC-based assays
not available in specimen data — requires direct inquiry

ground_truth_overlap.pass: find C-BIG OR find at least 1 alternative with documented PLS specimens (not just ALS/MND)

checks: no invented specimen counts — every N cites a source
no invented contacts — every email traces to paper/website/registry
no training-data fills for cost or biomarker data
ALS sources must NOT be presented as PLS sources without explicit PLS documentation
usable N of 20 donors must not be inflated from 529 total specimens across all diagnoses
